message:
feat(golden,canvas,wasm): add 6 new golden test diagrams, font-aware mock text metrics, edge label font sizing, and canvas theme presets

Golden tests: Adds ER, quadrant, gitgraph, xychart, mindmap, and timeline
diagram types to both the layout checksum and SVG golden test suites with
corresponding .mmd input and .svg reference files, expanding coverage from
7 to 13 diagram types.

Canvas mock context: measure_text now tracks the current font size (parsed
from the "Npx family" font string) and scales character width proportionally
(0.57 * font_size) instead of using a fixed 8px estimate. This makes edge
label background rectangle sizing accurate in tests. New test
mock_context_measure_text_tracks_font_size verifies the size tracking.

Canvas renderer: Edge label rendering now sets the font to the 0.85x edge
label size BEFORE measuring text for the background rectangle, fixing a bug
where the background was sized using the previous font context's metrics.
New test edge_label_background_uses_edge_label_font_metrics verifies the
background width matches expected measurements.

WASM: Adds apply_canvas_theme_preset() that maps ThemeColors from a
ThemePreset into CanvasRenderConfig visual fields (node_fill, node_stroke,
edge_stroke, cluster_fill, cluster_stroke, label_color), keeping canvas
and SVG theme-consistent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+erDiagram
+    USER ||--o{ ORDER : places
+    ORDER ||--|{ LINE_ITEM : contains
+    USER {
+        int id PK
+        string name
+        string email UK
+    }

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+gitGraph
+    commit
+    commit
+    branch develop
+    checkout develop
+    commit
+    commit
+    checkout main
+    merge develop
+    commit

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+mindmap
+    root((Central Topic))
+        Branch A
+            Leaf 1
+            Leaf 2
+        Branch B
+            Leaf 3

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+quadrantChart
+    title Feature Priority
+    x-axis Low Effort --> High Effort
+    y-axis Low Value --> High Value
+    quadrant-1 Do First
+    quadrant-2 Schedule
+    quadrant-3 Delegate
+    quadrant-4 Eliminate
+    Feature A: [0.8, 0.9]
+    Feature B: [0.3, 0.7]
+    Feature C: [0.6, 0.2]

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+timeline
+    title History
+    2020 : Event A
+    2021 : Event B : Event C
+    2022 : Event D

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+xychart-beta
+    title "Sales Revenue"
+    x-axis [Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May]
+    y-axis "Revenue (in $)" 4000 --> 11000
+    bar [5000, 6000, 7500, 8200, 9800]
